name: Giant Owl

traits.name: Languages
traits.text: Celestial; understands Common, Elvish, And Sylvan but can't speak them

traits.name: Flyby
traits.text: The owl doesn’t provoke an Opportunity Attack when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

text:
# Giant Owl

*Large Celestial, Neutral*

A silent-winged guardian of fey woods that converses with those it trusts.

### Actions

**Talons.** Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) Slashing damage.
